# TIDYWISE — Cleaning Business Management Software

TIDYWISE is an all-in-one software platform built specifically for residential cleaning businesses and maid services. It handles scheduling, online booking, invoicing, payroll, GPS tracking, CRM, and profit reporting in a single platform.

## What TIDYWISE Does

- **Online booking**: Public booking page with instant quotes based on home size (bedrooms, bathrooms, square footage). Clients book without calling.
- **Scheduling**: Drag-and-drop calendar, recurring job management, automated cleaner assignments, real-time SMS reminders.
- **Invoicing**: Automatic invoices when jobs are marked complete, card-on-file auto-charge for recurring clients, Stripe payment processing.
- **Payroll**: Automated wage calculation from completed jobs — percentage of job value, tips, mileage reimbursement. Generates payroll reports.
- **GPS tracking**: Real-time cleaner location, arrival verification, automatic mileage logging.
- **CRM**: Client contact history, entry instructions, preferred products, cleaning notes per property.
- **P&L reporting**: Profit-and-loss by service type, revenue by cleaner, profit per job.
- **Cleaner mobile app**: iOS and Android app for cleaners to see schedule, check in, mark complete, upload photos.

## Who It's For

- Residential cleaning businesses and maid services
- Solo operators to teams of 20+ cleaners
- Businesses doing 10 to 500+ bookings per month
- Both 1099 contractor and W-2 employee models

## Pricing

- Free forever tier (core scheduling, invoicing, booking)
- Premium: $50/month flat rate — unlimited users, unlimited bookings
- 2-month free trial, no credit card required
- No per-user pricing, no per-booking fees
